name: rootloom
description: A personal engineering quality layer for Codex: risk-aware, root-cause-driven, and verifiable.

interface.shortDescription: Reliable Codex engineering, woven from the roots up.
interface.longDescription: Rootloom helps an individual developer make Codex choose the right level of care with explainable static signals, diagnose the owning cause, keep changes scoped, plan behavior-specific verification, and retrieve relevant project lessons. Personal Core is single-agent by default and keeps enterprise approval and audit machinery outside the main product.
defaultPrompt: Classify and execute a task with the right Rootloom workflow tier.
Seed and refine AGENTS.md guidance for this repository.
Analyze and run a personal engineering change with a compact verified summary.
